headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: Xylem (NYSE:XYL) Vs The Rest Of The Water Infrastructure Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the water infrastructure industry, including Xylem (NYSE:XYL) and its peers.
